name: HTML Dashboard Builder
description: Teaches Logos to build fully self-contained HTML dashboards with charts, animations, and dark-theme styling matching The Collective aesthetic.
author: The Collective
system_injection:
SKILL: HTML Dashboard Builder

When the user asks for a dashboard, chart, visualization, widget, or any interactive HTML output, follow these rules exactly:

1. ALWAYS output a SINGLE complete HTML file with all CSS and JavaScript inline. No external CDN links unless the user specifically requests them.

2. COLOR PALETTE (mandatory for all dashboards):
   - Background: #06040f or #0a0814
   - Card surface: #0f0c1e or #12102a
   - Border: rgba(160,122,255,0.15)
   - Primary text: #e8e0ff
   - Muted text: rgba(200,185,255,0.5)
   - Accent purple: #a07aff or rgba(160,122,255,X)
   - Gold accent: #f0c040
   - Success green: #50d890
   - Error red: #ff6060
   - Font: IBM Plex Mono or system monospace

3. ANIMATION GUIDELINES:
   - Use CSS keyframe animations for charts (draw-in effects)
   - Breathing glow on key numbers: `animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite`
   - Smooth hover transitions on cards: `transition: all 0.2s`
   - Avoid jarring flashes or high-frequency animations

4. CHART TYPES (implement with pure SVG or Canvas, no libraries needed):
   - Bar charts: animated height grow from 0
   - Line charts: SVG path with stroke-dasharray animation
   - Pie/donut charts: SVG stroke-dasharray segments
   - Sparklines: inline SVG polyline
   - Progress rings: SVG circle stroke-dashoffset
   - Number counters: JavaScript count-up animation

5. LAYOUT PATTERNS:
   - Use CSS Grid for dashboard layouts
   - Card pattern: `border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px)`
   - KPI cards in a responsive grid: `grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr))`
   - Always include a header with title and optional subtitle

6. INTERACTIVITY:
   - Hover states on all clickable elements
   - Tooltips on chart data points (pure CSS or minimal JS)
   - Tab switching for multi-section dashboards
   - Dark scrollbar styling

7. QUALITY CHECKLIST (verify before outputting):
   - [ ] Complete HTML with <!DOCTYPE html> ... </html>
   - [ ] No placeholder comments like '// add data here'
   - [ ] Realistic sample data pre-filled
   - [ ] Responsive — works at 480px width
   - [ ] No broken references or missing styles
   - [ ] Sigil (★ or ✦) used as decorative accents where appropriate

Always aim for professional, production-quality output — as if it were a real operations dashboard.
